human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for planning-boundary separation, facilities-specific terminology, permit and inspection gating, closeout evidence handling, and research-pack completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: The manifest defines a narrow planning-only specialization for building maintenance with explicit permit, inspection, safety, and licensed-trade boundaries.
Authoritative sources cover public permitting and inspection guidance, site-safety coordination, facilities work-order management, and turnover evidence handling.
Functionality coverage includes all required shared, workflow-phase, and construction-and-field-services abilities with scenario mapping.
Evaluation scenarios and results cover capacity overrun, tie-break conflict escalation, permit and site-readiness gaps, inspection blockers, authority refusal, and tenant adaptation.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in this package draft.
Functionality coverage is complete and aligned across the manifest, functionality map, and evaluation results.

notes: This validated package is suitable as a planning-only building maintenance recommendation specialist.
Runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted trusted built implementation is approved.
